title: Earthy Creamy Mediterranean Butternut Squash Stew
description: A hearty, plant-based stew featuring roasted butternut squash, Mediterranean spices, and a creamy coconut milk broth. Perfect for a chilly evening, this one-pot dish is both nourishing and flavorful.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened and lightly browned (8-10 minutes).
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the cubed butternut squash and cook, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes.
Add the diced tomatoes, coconut milk, vegetable broth, dried oregano, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, until the squash is tender (20-25 minutes).
Use an immersion blender to puree the stew to your desired consistency, or leave it chunky if you prefer.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs or a dollop of coconut cream if desired.
